# Cyberstar IT
> Value-added IT reseller helping US small businesses build resilient technology infrastructure.

## About
Cyberstar IT is a vendor-agnostic IT reseller and consultancy serving small to medium businesses (up to 200 employees) across the United States. We help SMBs select, deploy, and manage business technology — from phone systems to cybersecurity solutions.

## Key Topics
- Business Phone Systems & VoIP
- IT Hardware & Infrastructure
- Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR)
- Managed Detection & Response (MDR)
- Backup & Disaster Recovery
- Patch Management
- Cybersecurity for Small Business
- IT Buying Guides & Comparisons

## Services
- Phone Systems: Cloud VoIP, UCaaS, hosted PBX solutions
- Hardware: Business laptops, servers, networking equipment
- Cybersecurity: EDR, MDR, backup, patch management
- IT Consulting: Vendor-agnostic technology assessments

## Contact
- Website: https://cyberstarit.com
- Location: United States

## Content
- Blog: https://cyberstarit.com/blog (80+ articles on IT solutions for SMBs)
- Sitemap: https://cyberstarit.com/sitemap.xml
